title: abutilon cryptopetalum
intro: Abutilon cryptopetalum, also known as the lantern flower or hongying, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, characterized by its unique bell-shaped flowers with bright yellow and red stripes. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Abutilon cryptopetalum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Abutilon cryptopetalum can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them as a tincture, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
